title: Show hours worked by each person or employee for each day
excerpt:
I have set a column to track the time for tasks. The time tracking shows how much time is spent for each task and is summed at the bottom of a group.

posts.author: Leeman (Leeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have set a column to track the time for tasks. The time tracking shows how much time is spent for each task and is summed at the bottom of a group.

But is there a way to show the amount of hours worked each day for a particular person? Like a calendar view or list showing…

10th October, Employee A, Total hours worked, 1 hour
11th October, Employee A, Total hours worked 5.5 hours
12th October, Employee A, Total hours worked 8 hours

I need to do invoices according to time spent each day for each team member, i can’t seem to find any help on how to show this.
